parameters.name: ptdel
parameters.label: Delete Attributes
parameters.description: Use the field to specify the point attributes to delete. Simply enter a list of the attributes (separated by spaces) to delete, for example entering: . You can also use the dropdown menu on the right

parameters.name: pt0from
parameters.label: From Attribute
parameters.description: Specify the attribute you wish to rename, or select it from the dropdown menu on the right.

parameters.name: pt0to
parameters.label: To Attribute
parameters.description: Enter the new name for the attribute here.
